similar_nature_of_job: Supply of High Energy Igniters (HEA), Flameproof Portable Ignitors, Flame Scanners, and related electronic/instrumentation spares.
details_of_work_order_submitted: The bidder submitted multiple work orders for the supply of HEA Igniter systems and spares to major industrial clients including IOCL Panipat Refinery (Rs. 17.49 Lakhs), IOCL Haldia Refinery (Rs. 11.96 Lakhs), Tata Power Trombay (Rs. 3.12 Lakhs), and Haldia Petrochemicals (Rs. 1.75 Lakhs).
name_of_issuer: Indian Oil Corporation Limited (Panipat, Haldia, and Mathura Refineries), The Tata Power Company Limited, and Haldia Petrochemicals Limited.
executed_value_as_per_completion_certifi: IOCL Panipat: 22.39 Lakhs; IOCL Haldia: 15.31 Lakhs; Tata Power: 4.00 Lakhs; Haldia Petrochemicals: 2.24 Lakhs; IOCL Mathura: 2.24 Lakhs.
work_order_meeting_experience_criteria: Work Order GEMC-511687747521927 from IOCL Panipat for HEA Ignition Exciter Box and spares with an executed value of Rs. 22.39 Lakhs.
additional_technical_pqc: OEM Status: The bidder has submitted a self-declaration as the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) for HEA Igniter Systems.
